_note: REPRESENTATIVE synthetic assumption, same honesty tier as cost_basis.json -- NOT a measured labour statistic. Pongal (Tamil Nadu's harvest festival, mid-January) is a real, well-documented calendar fact that drives a genuine construction-labour migration dip in Chennai as site workers travel to native districts. The WINDOW below is a calendar fact; the DIP MAGNITUDE (availability_factor) is a conservative, documented assumption chosen for this demo, not a cited statistic.
